entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for hybrid seed production.

entities.name: HYBRID SEED PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing hybrid seeds for economic gain.

entities.name: GENETIC-CYTOPLASMIC MALE-STERILITY
entities.description: A genetic condition used to facilitate the production of hybrid seeds.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural productivity of the crop.

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the local cultivars and landraces originate.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon where hybrid offspring exhibit superior traits compared to their parents.

entities.name: SEEDLING VIGOUR
entities.description: The health and strength of the plant during the seedling stage.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand water-deficient conditions.

entities.name: FERTILITY REACTIONS
entities.description: The response of landraces regarding their ability to produce fertile pollen.

entities.name: MAINTAINER REACTIONS
entities.description: The response of landraces in maintaining male sterility in hybrids.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PANICLE
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by a single panicle.

entities.name: PANICLE YIELD COMPONENTS
entities.description: The individual factors contributing to the overall panicle yield.

entities.name: SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The quantity of seeds produced per panicle.

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seeds produced.

entities.name: ATX623
entities.description: A specific sorghum line used as a parent in hybrid combinations.

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of a crop developed over time in a specific location.

entities.name: TURTLE-BACK SEED SHAPE
entities.description: A specific seed morphology characteristic of the Caudatum race.

entities.name: DEHULLING
entities.description: The process of removing the outer hull of the grain.

entities.name: GUINEA
entities.description: The origin of the parents that produced hybrids with thick brown sub coats.

entities.name: THICK BROWN SUB COAT
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the seed coat found in guinea parents.

entities.name: ASTRINGENT TANNINS
entities.description: Chemical compounds in the seed coat that affect taste and food quality.
